207.178.200.1/18
RG -> 207.178.192.0/18
BC -> 207.178.255.255
207.178.11 00 1000.00000001
207.178.11 00 0000.00000000

VLAN 10 3300 -> ^12
RG -> 207.178.192.0/20
BC -> 207.178.207.255
IPE-> 207.178.204.228
207.178.11 00 0000.00000000
207.178.11 00 1111.11111111
207.178.11 00 1100.11100100

IP DHCP POOL VLAN_10
NETWORK 207.178.192.0 255.255.240.0
DEFAULT-ROUTER 207.178.204.228
OPTION 150 IP 207.178.204.228
DNS-SERVER 20.0.0.2
EXIT

INTERFACE VLAN 10
IP ADDRESS 207.178.204.228 255.255.240.0
EXIT

INTERFACE VLAN 10
IP ADDRESS 207.178.204.228 255.255.240.0
ip helper-address 207.178.192.0
EXIT

VLAN 20 2900 -> ^12
RG -> 207.178.208.0/20
BC -> 207.178.223.255
IPE-> 207.178.219.84
207.178.11 01 0000.00000000
207.178.11 01 1111.11111111
207.178.11 01 1011.01010100

NETWORK 207.178.208.0 255.255.240.0
DEFAULT-ROUTER 207.178.219.84
OPTION 150 IP 207.178.219.84
DNS-SERVER 20.0.0.2
EXIT

INTERFACE VLAN 20
IP ADDRESS 207.178.219.84 255.255.240.0
EXIT

INTERFACE VLAN 20
IP ADDRESS 207.178.219.84 255.255.240.0
ip helper-address 207.178.208.0
EXIT

207.178.11 10 001 0. 11001000

VLAN 11 10 -> ^4
RG -> 207.178.228.0/28
BC -> 207.178.228.15
IPE-> 207.178.228.10
207.178.11 10 010 0.0000 0000
207.178.11 10 010 0.0000 1111
207.178.11 10 010 0.0000 1010

NETWORK 207.178.228.0 255.255.255.240
DEFAULT-ROUTER 207.178.228.10
OPTION 150 IP 207.178.228.10
DNS-SERVER 20.0.0.2
EXIT

EXIT

ip helper-address 207.178.228.0
EXIT
